filename: RFP- Engagement of Consultant for Designing & Developing of Annual Report.pdf

issuing_organization.name: Multi Commodity Exchange of India Limited (MCX)

scope_of_work.description: End-to-end management, design, content development and layout of Integrated Annual Report and Annual Financial Statements with creative design services, content development, interviews, and delivery of print and digital versions
deliverables: Integrated Annual Report design and layout
digital_deliverables: Digital versions compatible across devices and formats

frameworks.framework_notes: BRSR (Business Responsibility and Sustainability Reporting) explicitly mentioned as part of statutory reports to be presented. Integrated Annual Report approach suggests IR Framework implementation with Value Creation Model and capital-wise performance mentioned.

scoring_parameters.parameter: Number of employees to be deployed

financial_terms.payment_structure: Payment only after delivery of hard copy and soft copy of Annual Report and completion of assignment
financial_terms.gst_treatment: Prices to be quoted excluding taxes, statutory deductions will be made

submission_requirements.format: Email confirmation required first, then e-bidding process details will be provided

special_requirements: Minimum 5 years experience in Annual Report services
Experience with at least 10 listed companies in last 5 years including 3 top 250 companies
Minimum 5 qualified manpower with Annual Report experience
One full-time designer to be provided on MCX premises
Compliance with CII protection and IT security norms
No current debarment/blacklisting by regulatory bodies
Penalty of 2% per week delay up to 10% maximum

clarifications.question: The RFP mentions three report options (Traditional 350 pages, Partial Integrated 400 pages, Fully Integrated 450 pages) but doesn't specify which one MCX prefers. Which type of report does MCX want, and what are the specific differences in scope between these three options?
clarifications.reason: Cannot prepare accurate proposal or pricing without knowing the exact report type and scope requirements

clarifications.question: While BRSR is mentioned as being provided by MCX, there's no clarity on whether the Integrated Report should follow the IR Framework principles. Should we structure the report around the IR Framework's six capitals and value creation model, or follow a different reporting structure?
clarifications.section_reference: Scope of Work - Point 2 under Developing section
clarifications.reason: IR Framework compliance significantly impacts report structure, content development approach, and overall project scope

clarifications.question: What is the complete project timeline from contract award to final delivery? The RFP mentions penalties for delays but doesn't specify the actual delivery deadline or key milestones.
clarifications.reason: Cannot plan resources or assess feasibility without clear project timeline and milestones

clarifications.question: The scope mentions providing 'one full time designer in our premises exclusively' but doesn't specify the duration. For how many months/weeks is the on-site designer required, and what are the specific working hours and security clearance requirements?
clarifications.section_reference: Scope of Work - Point 7 under Developing section
clarifications.reason: On-site resource deployment has significant cost and logistics implications that affect pricing

clarifications.question: For the materiality assessment mentioned in scope point 2, does MCX have an existing materiality matrix or stakeholder engagement results, or do you expect us to conduct fresh stakeholder consultations and materiality analysis?
clarifications.section_reference: Scope of Work - Point 2 under Developing section
clarifications.reason: Materiality assessment scope significantly impacts project timeline, resources required, and content development approach

clarifications.question: What are the specific print specifications required - paper GSM for cover and inner pages, binding type, print quantities for the annual report, and any special printing requirements like spot UV, embossing, or special paper finishes?
clarifications.reason: Print specifications directly impact cost calculations and vendor selection for printing partnerships

clarifications.question: The pricing structure shows 'Designing' and 'Developing' as separate columns but doesn't clarify if printing costs are additional. Should we quote printing costs separately, and if so, what print quantities are required?
clarifications.reason: Unclear pricing structure could lead to budget mismatches and proposal rejection

clarifications.question: How many revision rounds are included in the scope? The RFP mentions proofreading and corrections but doesn't specify limits on client feedback cycles or revision iterations.
clarifications.section_reference: Scope of Work - Point 5 under Developing section
clarifications.reason: Unlimited revisions can significantly impact project profitability and timeline

clarifications.question: Who will provide the financial data, audited statements, and statutory reports? What is the expected timeline for MCX to provide all content inputs, and in what format will the data be shared?
clarifications.section_reference: Scope of Work - Point 4 under Designing section
clarifications.reason: Content provision timeline affects our project planning and resource allocation

clarifications.question: Are there existing MCX brand guidelines, design templates, or previous annual report designs that need to be referenced or followed? Should we provide multiple design concept options for selection?
clarifications.section_reference: Scope of Work - Point 1 under Designing section
clarifications.reason: Brand guideline availability affects design development time and creative approach

clarifications.question: The evaluation mentions 'presentation evidencing proof of past experience and approach' worth 20 marks. What format is expected for this presentation - physical, virtual, duration, and what specific elements should be covered?
clarifications.section_reference: Annexure C - Technical Evaluation Criteria, Point 4
clarifications.reason: Presentation format and requirements affect proposal preparation strategy and resource planning

clarifications.question: What is MCX's approval hierarchy for the annual report? Who are the key stakeholders involved in review and sign-off, and what is the typical approval cycle duration?
clarifications.reason: Approval process complexity affects timeline planning and stakeholder management approach

clarifications.question: For the digital version deliverables, what specific formats are required - interactive PDF, HTML, mobile-responsive website, or EPUB? Are there any accessibility compliance requirements?
clarifications.reason: Digital format requirements affect development effort and technical specifications

clarifications.question: As a SEBI-regulated exchange, are there specific regulatory filing requirements or formats for the annual report that need to be considered beyond the BRSR compliance already mentioned?
clarifications.reason: Regulatory compliance requirements affect report structure and content development approach

org_name: Multi Commodity Exchange of India Limited (MCX)
